name: Superfast Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 large prepared pizza crust (whole wheat preferred)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the pasta sauce and beans. Stir to mix. Add spices to taste (garlic, oregano, black pepper, cumin). No salt needed.
2. Saute onion and mushrooms in cooking spray until onions are translucent and mushrooms are tender. Add dried tomatoes for 30 seconds before turning off heat.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. Spread pasta sauce/beans evenly over the pizza crust on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Sprinkle nutritional yeast over the sauce, ensuring full contact.
6. Bake in preheated oven for 11 minutes, or until the crust is warm and crisp.
7. Serve hot.
Note: This recipe is experimental and may contain more toppings than intended. The crust should be pre-baked before assembly for best results.
